dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome back, here is your system overview
dashboard.registerAgentFirst: Please register an Agent instance before getting started
dashboard.taskExecutionStatsDescription: Task execution summary for the past 7 days
dashboard.welcomeMessage: This is a brand new system. Please register an Agent to get started

agents.title: Agent Management
agents.subtitle: Manage and monitor all rauto Agent instances
agents.deleteAgentSuccess: Agent "{name}" and its devices were deleted
agents.noAgentsDescription: Please register your first rauto Agent instance. Once connected, you can start managing network devices

devices.title: Device Management
devices.subtitle: Manage all network devices in one place
devices.noDevicesDescription: Please add your first network device. Routers, switches, and many other device types are supported

tasks.title: Task Orchestration
tasks.subtitle: Create and execute automation tasks
tasks.noTasksDescription: Create your first automation task. Supports template-based batch execution of network device commands
tasks.taskQueued: Task accepted by the Agent and queued for background execution
tasks.confirmExecuteDescription: Are you sure you want to execute task "{name}"? The task will be sent to the Agent for execution.
tasks.confirmCancelDescription: Are you sure you want to cancel task "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
tasks.liveExecutionDescription: Track manager-side and agent-reported progress for this task
tasks.waitingForExecutionEventsDescription: Manager events already appear here. Detailed step logs will show up once the agent starts reporting them.
tasks.eventQueued: Task created in manager and waiting to execute
tasks.eventAccepted: Agent "{name}" accepted the task and queued it for background execution
tasks.eventDispatching: Manager is dispatching this task to Agent "{name}"
tasks.eventDispatchFailed: Failed to dispatch task to Agent "{name}": {error}
tasks.eventMarkedFailedFromErrorReport: Manager marked this task as failed based on the Agent error report
tasks.fallbackTaskFailureFromErrorReport: The Agent reported that task execution failed, but the final callback did not reach Manager

history.title: Execution History
history.subtitle: View all task execution records and logs
history.searchPlaceholder: Search by task, command, or output...
history.latestRecordsDescription: Search and narrow down execution records from all completed task callbacks
history.noFilteredRecordsDescription: Try adjusting your search keywords or filters to find matching execution history
history.recordDetailsDescription: Inspect the raw output and related context for this execution record
history.outputUnavailable: No output captured for this execution record
history.noRecordsDescription: Once you start executing tasks, all execution records and logs will appear here

search.title: Global Search
search.subtitle: Search agents, devices, tasks, and execution history from one place
search.searchPlaceholder: Search by agent name, device host, task name, or command...
search.emptyDescription: Try an agent name, device host, task name, or command output
search.minLengthDescription: Enter at least {count} characters to start searching
search.noResultsDescription: Try a different keyword or search by host, task name, or command content

auth.adminLoginDescription: Please enter your admin account credentials
auth.footer: Rauto Manager - Network Device Automation Platform
auth.setupSubtitle: First-time use requires creating an admin account
auth.createAdminDescription: Set your admin username and password. This account will be used to log into the system
auth.setupFooter: After creating the account, you will be automatically logged into the system
auth.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.provideCurrentAndNewPassword: Please provide current password and new password
auth.newPasswordMinLength: New password must be at least 6 characters

settings.title: System Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage system configuration and preferences
settings.userProfileDescription: Manage account information and security settings
settings.emailDescription: Email address associated with the account
settings.changePasswordHint: Enter your current password and new password. New password must be at least 6 characters, including letters and numbers.
settings.newPasswordPlaceholder: At least 6 characters, including letters and numbers
settings.passwordIncomplete: Please fill in all password fields
settings.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 6 characters
settings.passwordRequiresLetterAndNumber: New password must contain letters and numbers
settings.passwordSameAsOld: New password cannot be the same as current password
settings.agentConfigDescription: System name, Agent heartbeat, and timeout settings
settings.systemNameDescription: System name displayed in the interface
settings.agentTimeoutDescription: Timeout threshold for marking Agent offline after no heartbeat (30-600 seconds)
settings.heartbeatRangeError: Heartbeat interval must be between 5-300 seconds
settings.agentTimeoutAlertDescription: Send alert when Agent heartbeat times out
settings.deviceReportDescription: Notify when Agent reports device information
settings.taskDispatchedDescription: Notify when task is dispatched to Agent
settings.taskFailedDescription: Send alert when task execution fails
settings.appearanceDescription: Customize the light/dark mode and color scheme
settings.dataManagementDescription: View system data statistics and cleanup options
settings.clearHistoryDescription: Delete all task execution records ({count} total)
settings.confirmClearHistoryDescription: This will delete all {count} execution history records. This action cannot be undone.
settings.confirmClearNotificationsDescription: This will delete all {count} notification records. This action cannot be undone.
settings.resetConfirmationRequired: Please type "RESET" to confirm this action
settings.dangerZoneDescription: The following actions are irreversible. Please proceed with caution
settings.resetSystemDescription: Clear all business data (Agents, devices, tasks, history, notifications, configs) while keeping the admin account
settings.confirmResetDescription: This will clear all business data including Agents, devices, tasks, execution history, notifications, and system configs. The admin account will be preserved. This action cannot be undone!
settings.languageDescription: Choose the display language for the interface
settings.languageReloadNotice: The page will refresh to apply the new language

dialogs.createTaskDescription: Select dispatch type and target device, configure task parameters, then dispatch to Agent for execution
dialogs.noAvailableConnections: No available connections for this Agent
dialogs.agentDetailDescription: Inspect runtime details and devices for Agent "{name}"
dialogs.agentDetailNoDevices: No devices linked to this Agent
dialogs.agentDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete offline Agent "{name}"? All devices managed by this Agent will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
dialogs.deviceDetailNoMetadata: No metadata captured for this device
dialogs.deviceDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete device "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
dialogs.registerAgentDescription: Execute the following command on your server to register an Agent instance over HTTP reporting
dialogs.managerUrlDescription: Manager HTTP(S) base URL (defaults to the current browser origin)
dialogs.reportModeDescription: Manager reporting transport. Use "http" when the manager only exposes HTTP(S)
dialogs.agentTokenDescription: Agent authentication token (must match Manager API Key)
dialogs.step1: Ensure rauto CLI tool is installed
dialogs.step2: Copy the command above to the server terminal
dialogs.step3: Modify the --agent-name parameter as needed (hostname recommended)
dialogs.step4: Execute the command to start the Agent
dialogs.step5: Agent will call the Manager HTTP reporting endpoints and begin heartbeat
dialogs.needHelp: Need help? Check the documentation for more
dialogs.addDeviceDescription: Configure device connection information and test connection (device will be synced to rauto Agent)
dialogs.deviceNameHint: This name will be used as the connection name in rauto
dialogs.noDeviceProfiles: No Device Profiles available for this Agent
dialogs.deviceProfileHint: Dynamically fetched from the selected Agent's supported Device Profiles
dialogs.sshSecurityHint: Choose key exchange algorithm level. Secure offers highest security but may not work with older devices. Legacy Compatible supports older devices but with lower security
dialogs.passwordStorageHint: Password will be saved to rauto Agent. Manager does not store passwords
dialogs.testConnectionSuccess: Connection test succeeded! Device is reachable
dialogs.testRequiredFields: Please fill in required fields: Agent, host address, username, Device Profile
dialogs.addDeviceSuccess: Device added and synced to rauto successfully
dialogs.requiredFieldsIncludingPassword: Please fill in all required fields (including password)

taskForms.stageTemplateEmpty: Stage {number} template name cannot be empty
